word: G1380 - δοκέω - dokéō - dok-eh'-o - Be accounted

sections.paragraph:
δοκέω - dokeō - dok-eh'-o

A prolonged form of a primary verb δόκω dokō (used only as an alternate in certain tenses; compare the base of G1166); of the same meaning; to think; by implication to seem (truthfully or uncertainly): - be accounted, (of own) please (-ure), be of reputation, seem (good), suppose, think, trow.
